Skip to main content
You Dashboards People Events
Subscribe
Alerts & notifications
Critical — act now
HOME-ARP comment window is live — closes May 26, 2026. COS is collecting public comment on the HOME-ARP Allocation Plan amendment via an ArcGIS Survey123 form Esri's own ACR rates as "Partially Supports" on WCAG 2.1 A/AA. A WCAG 2.1 AA Drupal Webform replacement is ready to install — bilingual EN/ES, JSON webhook + staff email + native storage, inline accommodation intake.
24 CFR 91.105 · ADA Title II · May 4, 2026
Open the HOME-ARP bundle →
Downtown Funding and Records Search Search BID assessments, DDA grants, TIF reimbursements, board meetings, and financial records in one place.
Annual adopted budget — C.R.S. 29-1-101 et seq · April 10, 2026
Open the search portal →
ADA Title II deadline: April 24, 2026 — 16 days. All local government websites must meet WCAG 2.1 AA. Zero district sites are confirmed compliant on PDF documents.
HB21-1110 · 28 C.F.R. Part 35 · April 8, 2026
Open district audit dashboard →
249 of 284 metro districts have no website. CORA request is the only way a resident can access their own district's records.
EPC Assessor audit · April 2026
See district audit →
WS Districts (WSDM) serves 30+ districts on a single WordPress site. Last calendar entry: 2021. No governance docs. No financials. One compliance letter fixes all 30+ simultaneously.
Platform audit · April 2026
Draft compliance letter →
High priority
All posted PDFs likely fail WCAG 1.3.1. Meeting minutes, budgets, and audit docs are almost certainly untagged. This is the real HB21-1110 failure — not the homepage.
ADA document audit · April 2026
View ADA analysis →
0 of 8 audited sites post their service plan. C.R.S. §32-1-202 requires it. This is the foundational legal document. Not one district links it publicly.
Governance gap · §32-1-202
See audit dashboard →
Annual audit documents: publicly posted by 0 of 8 districts. Required by §32-1-106. Due to State Auditor by July 31. The clock is running.
Governance gap · §32-1-106 · due July 31
See audit dashboard →
Informational
2 CORA requests pending response. Military housing numbers and district governance records both awaiting reply. Response window is still open.
CORA tracker · April 2026
View tracker →
Wolfersberger compliance and Bellamese analysis complete. New findings ready for review on developer agreements, compliance history, and parcel-level records.
Compliance analysis · April 2026
Read analysis →
Jurisdiction finder is live. Enter any El Paso County address to find your metro districts, school district, city jurisdiction, and utilities — plain language, no login.
New · April 2026
Find my jurisdiction →
CSPD Blotter — Weekly History is live. 271 incidents pulled directly from the live blotter feed, paired with a Poisson 95% confidence band to flag statistical anomalies week to week. Tabs are full APG-pattern keyboard accessible; every chart has an aria-label.
New · April 2026 · WCAG 2.1 AA
Open blotter dashboard →
Lorson Ranch financial dashboard is live. Seven cross-pledged metro districts, $94.2M aggregate audited deficit, IGA money flows, and a per-home tax calculator — sourced from 2026 budgets and 2024 audits. Companion plain-language briefing available as a download.
New · Special Districts · April 2026
Open Lorson Ranch dashboard →
CBI Missing Persons form — accessible rebuild is live. Resolves all seven critical/serious findings from the ADA audit: skip link, live regions, focus management, EN/ES localization, real-time validation messaging. Drops into the existing Drupal Webform infrastructure with optional Claude API routing.
New · State · April 2026 · WCAG 2.1 AA
Open CBI form rebuild →
LexisNexis ADAM Program dashboard — accessible rebuild is live. Audit and reference rebuild of the missing-children dashboard: APG-pattern tabs with roving tabindex and full keyboard nav, solid amber focus rings (3:1 against any surface), darker success-green for AA contrast, and "View Poster" placeholders converted from dead anchors to real buttons.
New · Private Sector · April 2026 · WCAG 2.1 AA
Open ADAM dashboard →
:root { --bg: #F5F1EA; --surface: #FFFFFF; --surface-2: #FBF7F0; --text: #14181F; --text-muted: #5C6573; --text-subtle: #8A8F9B; --border: #E5DDD0; --border-strong: #D4CABA; --brand: #1E3A5F; --brand-dark: #142A47; --accent: #B8410C; --accent-hover: #9A3508; --status-clear: #2D7A4E; --status-clear-bg: #E8F2EC; --status-advisory: #A37000; --status-advisory-bg: #FAF1DA; --status-warning: #C2410C; --status-warning-bg: #FCEAD9; --status-evac: #A4161A; --status-evac-bg: #F8DCDD; --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(20,24,31,0.04), 0 1px 3px rgba(20,24,31,0.06); --shadow-md: 0 2px 4px rgba(20,24,31,0.06), 0 4px 12px rgba(20,24,31,0.08); --shadow-lg: 0 8px 24px rgba(20,24,31,0.12), 0 2px 8px rgba(20,24,31,0.08); --radius-sm: 4px; --radius: 6px; --radius-lg: 10px; } * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.55; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 10%, rgba(30,58,95,0.025), transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 80%, rgba(184,65,12,0.02), transparent 50%); } /* Skip link */ .skip-link { position: absolute; top: -40px; left: 0; background: var(--brand); color: white; padding: 10px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0 0 var(--radius) 0; z-index: 1000; font-weight: 600; } .skip-link:focus { top: 0; } /* Focus styles */ :focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--brand); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; } /* Top bar */ .topbar { background: var(--surface); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); } .topbar-inner { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 14px 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 32px; } .brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; text-decoration: none; color: var(--text); } .brand-mark { width: 36px; height: 36px; background: var(--brand); border-radius: 50%; display: grid; place-items: center; color: white; font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .brand-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; line-height: 1.1; } .brand-text strong { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .brand-text span { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; } .nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .nav a { color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: var(--radius); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: background 0.15s; } .nav a:hover { background: var(--bg); } .nav a.current { background: var(--bg); color: var(--brand); } .cta-button { background: var(--accent); color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: var(--radius); font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.1s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .cta-button:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); } .cta-button:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .cta-button svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; } /* Hero */ .hero { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 48px 32px 32px; } .hero-eyebrow { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .live-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: var(--status-evac); border-radius: 50%; animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(0.85); } } .hero h1 { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 56px); letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.05; margin-bottom: 14px; max-width: 800px; font-variation-settings: "opsz" 96; } .hero h1 em { font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; color: var(--brand); } .hero-sub { font-size: 18px; color: var(--text-muted); max-width: 620px; margin-bottom: 28px; line-height: 1.5; } /* Search */ .search-form { display: flex; gap: 8px; max-width: 720px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .search-wrap { flex: 1; position: relative; } .search-input { width: 100%; padding: 16px 16px 16px 48px; border: 1.5px solid var(--border-strong); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; color: var(--text); transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); } .search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--brand); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(30,58,95,0.15); } .search-icon { position: absolute; left: 16px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 20px; height: 20px; color: var(--text-muted); pointer-events: none; } .search-button { background: var(--brand); color: white; border: none; padding: 0 28px; border-radius: var(--radius); font-family: inherit; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; } .search-button:hover { background: var(--brand-dark); } .demo-pills { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); } .demo-pills span { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-right: 4px; } .demo-pill { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); transition: all 0.15s; } .demo-pill:hover { background: var(--brand); color: white; border-color: var(--brand); } /* Status strip */ .status-strip { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); flex-wrap: wrap; } .status-strip-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .status-strip-item strong { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; } .status-strip-divider { width: 1px; height: 16px; background: var(--border-strong); } /* Main grid */ .main { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px 64px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 420px; gap: 24px; } /* Map panel */ .map-panel { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); overflow: hidden; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); position: relative; min-height: 600px; } #map { width: 100%; height: 600px; background: #E8E4DC; } .map-header { padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .map-header h2 { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .map-legend { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); } .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .legend-swatch { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 2px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } /* Sidebar panel */ .side-panel { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-height: 600px; } .tabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface-2); } .tab { flex: 1; padding: 14px 16px; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-muted); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .tab:hover { color: var(--text); } .tab.active { background: var(--surface); color: var(--brand); border-bottom-color: var(--brand); } .tab-count { display: inline-block; background: var(--bg); padding: 1px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; margin-left: 6px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; } .tab.active .tab-count { background: var(--brand); color: white; } .tab-content { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px; } /* Zone card */ .zone-card { padding: 16px; border-radius: var(--radius); margin-bottom: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; width: 100%; text-align: left; font-family: inherit; color: inherit; } .zone-card:hover { background: var(--surface-2); border-color: var(--border); } .zone-card.highlighted { background: var(--surface-2); border-color: var(--brand); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--brand); } .zone-card-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .zone-card-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: var(--text); } .zone-card-id { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-subtle); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-top: 2px; } .status-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; } .status-badge::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; } .status-evac { background: var(--status-evac-bg); color: var(--status-evac); } .status-evac::before { background: var(--status-evac); } .status-warning { background: var(--status-warning-bg); color: var(--status-warning); } .status-warning::before { background: var(--status-warning); } .status-advisory { background: var(--status-advisory-bg); color: var(--status-advisory); } .status-advisory::before { background: var(--status-advisory); } .status-clear { background: var(--status-clear-bg); color: var(--status-clear); } .status-clear::before { background: var(--status-clear); } .zone-card-desc { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.45; margin-top: 6px; } .zone-card-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-top: 10px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-subtle); font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; } /* Address result section */ .result-section { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px 64px; display: none; } .result-section.active { display: block; } .result-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); overflow: hidden; } .result-header { padding: 28px 32px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .result-address { flex: 1; min-width: 280px; } .result-address-label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 6px; } .result-address h2 { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 28px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin-bottom: 8px; } .result-meta { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); } .result-meta span { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .result-meta strong { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; } .result-status-block { padding: 28px 32px; } .result-status-block.evac { background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--status-evac-bg) 0%, transparent 100%); border-bottom: 3px solid var(--status-evac); } .result-status-block.clear { background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--status-clear-bg) 0%, transparent 100%); border-bottom: 3px solid var(--status-clear); } .result-status-block.warning { background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--status-warning-bg) 0%, transparent 100%); border-bottom: 3px solid var(--status-warning); } .result-status-headline { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 32px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.15; margin-bottom: 10px; } .result-status-block.evac .result-status-headline { color: var(--status-evac); } .result-status-block.clear .result-status-headline { color: var(--status-clear); } .result-status-block.warning .result-status-headline { color: var(--status-warning); } .result-guidance { font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--text); max-width: 720px; } .result-guidance p { margin-bottom: 12px; } .result-guidance p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } .result-actions { padding: 24px 32px; background: var(--surface-2); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .btn-primary { background: var(--accent); color: white; border: none; padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: var(--radius); font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; transition: background 0.15s; } .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); } .btn-secondary { background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); border: 1px solid var(--border-strong); padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: var(--radius); font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; transition: background 0.15s; } .btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--bg); } /* Connected records section */ .records-section { padding: 28px 32px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); } .records-section h3 { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .records-subhead { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 18px; } .records-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; } .record-item { padding: 14px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); transition: all 0.15s; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; display: block; } .record-item:hover { border-color: var(--brand); background: var(--surface-2); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); } .record-item-type { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 6px; } .record-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: var(--brand); } .record-item-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.35; margin-bottom: 4px; } .record-item-meta { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-subtle); font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; } /* Modal */ .modal-backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(20,24,31,0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); z-index: 1000; display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 20px; animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease; } .modal-backdrop.open { display: flex; } @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } } .modal { background: var(--surface); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); max-width: 520px; width: 100%; max-height: 90vh; overflow-y: auto; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); animation: slideUp 0.25s ease; } @keyframes slideUp { from { transform: translateY(20px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } } .modal-header { padding: 24px 28px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); position: relative; } .modal-header h2 { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 22px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin-bottom: 6px; } .modal-header p { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); } .modal-close { position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 16px; background: transparent; border: none; color: var(--text-muted); width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: var(--radius); cursor: pointer; display: grid; place-items: center; transition: background 0.15s; } .modal-close:hover { background: var(--bg); } .modal-body { padding: 24px 28px; } .address-binding { background: var(--surface-2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-left: 3px solid var(--brand); padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: var(--radius); margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 13px; } .address-binding-label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 4px; } .address-binding-value { font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); } .form-group { margin-bottom: 16px; } .form-label { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px; color: var(--text); } .form-input { width: 100%; padding: 11px 14px; border: 1.5px solid var(--border-strong); border-radius: var(--radius); font-family: inherit; font-size: 15px; background: var(--surface); transition: border-color 0.15s; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--brand); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(30,58,95,0.15); } .form-help { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px; } .checkboxes { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden; } .checkbox-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .checkbox-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .checkbox-item:hover { background: var(--surface-2); } .checkbox-item input[type="checkbox"] { margin-top: 3px; width: 16px; height: 16px; accent-color: var(--brand); cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; } .checkbox-label { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); } .checkbox-desc { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 2px; font-weight: 400; } .modal-footer { padding: 20px 28px; background: var(--surface-2); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .modal-footer-note { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); flex: 1; } .btn-large { padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 15px; } /* Footer */ .footer { background: var(--brand-dark); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); padding: 32px 0; margin-top: 32px; } .footer-inner { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px; font-size: 13px; } .footer a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); text-decoration: none; margin-right: 20px; } .footer a:hover { color: white; text-decoration: underline; } /* Leaflet customization */ .leaflet-popup-content-wrapper { border-radius: var(--radius); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; } .leaflet-popup-content { margin: 14px 16px; font-size: 13px; } .popup-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .popup-id { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 8px; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .main { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .side-panel { min-height: 400px; } #map { height: 450px; } .map-panel { min-height: 0; } } @media (max-width: 640px) { .topbar-inner { padding: 12px 16px; gap: 12px; } .nav { display: none; } .hero { padding: 32px 16px 24px; } .status-strip { padding: 0 16px 20px; gap: 12px; } .main { padding: 0 16px 32px; } .result-section { padding: 0 16px 32px; } .search-form { flex-direction: column; } .search-button { padding: 14px 24px; } .result-header { padding: 20px; } .result-status-block { padding: 20px; } .records-section { padding: 20px; } .result-actions { padding: 16px 20px; } }
PP
Pikes Peak Regional Emergency Management
Current Alerts Preparedness Resources About
Live · El Paso County · Updated 2 minutes ago

Is your address affected?

Search any address or parcel ID in El Paso County. See active alerts, exactly what to do, and every record connected to your property — in plain language.

Try:
1 Evacuation Order
1 Warning
1 Advisory
~14,200 residents affected
Data verified by El Paso County OEM · 02:47 PM MST

Evacuation
Warning
Advisory
Clear
© 2026 Pikes Peak Regional Office of Emergency Management
Accessibility Privacy Translate Contact

Get emergency-management updates from PPROEM

When PPROEM activates the ECC, issues a regional alert, or updates the zone map, we'll email you a plain-language summary. No marketing — just public-record updates.

By subscribing you agree to receive emails about this topic. We'll send a confirmation link first. Unsubscribe any time. (consent v2026-04-30-v1)
